message:
test: add atomic write, corrupted SQLite, and invalid session ID test suites

Add 12 atomic write integration tests covering conflict detection, force
write with backup, read-only directory errors, write-then-read roundtrips,
concurrent writes, and temp file cleanup for CC, Codex, and Gemini providers.
Add 11 corrupted SQLite tests for Cursor and OpenCode providers covering
random bytes, wrong schema, correct schema without rows, truncated headers,
and invalid JSON parts. Add 18 invalid session ID security tests covering
empty/long strings, path traversal, null bytes, Unicode abuse, shell
metacharacters, and error message safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
